_comment: Gen 1 OU Starmie — opponent fixture. Water/Psychic, paralysed, full HP, no boosts.
_note_stat_belief: Belief mean ≈ actual stats / STAT_NORM (512). Std reflects moderate uncertainty before scouting. 6th slot (index 5) is zero: gen 1 has no separate spd stat.
_note_boosts: poke-env always uses spa/spd boost keys even for gen 1.

stat_belief._note: mean[i] = estimated stat / 512, std[i] = uncertainty. Slot 5 (spd) is 0 for gen 1.
